message:
fix(tui): Apply clippy suggestions for idiomatic Result handling

- Replace map().unwrap_or() with is_ok_and() and map_or()
- Replace unwrap_or_else() with unwrap_or() for non-lazy evaluation

Part of bd-3775.1: TUI runtime panic fix verification
